info.title: QuickSchools API
info.description: QuickSchools.com is an Online School Management System. The REST API allows querying and modifying school data including students, teachers, parents, classes, sections, assignments, grades, and attendance.

get.description: Returns details of the current user's SchoolGroup
Returns the list of schools in the current user's SchoolGroup
Returns the details of the school associated with the currently-authenticated user or apiKey
Returns the list of semesters
Returns the details of the specified semester
Returns the list of classes (year levels like 1st Grade)
Returns the details of the specified class
Returns the list of homerooms
Returns the details of the specified homeroom
Returns the list of all teachers. Supports search, employeeNumbers, showDeleted, and showHasLeft parameters.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by teacher name or employee name

post.description: Adds or updates a teacher record. If teacherName or employeeNumber matches an existing record, it will be updated.

get.description: Returns the details of the specified teacher

delete.summary: Delete or mark teacher as left
delete.description: Marks the specified teacher as having left or deleted

parameters.name: delete
parameters.description: If true, marks as deleted instead of left

get.description: Returns the list of all students. Supports search, studentNumbers, showDeleted, showHasLeft, classId, homeroomId, and parentId filtering.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by student name, number, or class

post.description: Adds or updates a student record. If fullName or studentId matches an existing record, it will be updated.

get.description: Returns the details of the specified student

delete.summary: Delete or mark student as left
delete.description: Marks the student as Deleted or Has Left

get.description: Returns the list of all parents
Returns the details of the specified parent
Returns the list of all course sections for the current active semester
Returns the details of the specified course section
Returns the enrollments for a specific course section

post.description: Enrolls students into a specific course section

delete.description: Unenrolls students from a specific course section

post.description: Enrolls students into multiple courses at once

get.description: Returns the list of assignments for a course section
Returns details of a specific assignment
Returns grades for a specific assignment
Returns grades
Returns attendance records for a specific student
Returns a single attendance record for a student on a specific date

post.description: Sets the attendance for a particular student on a date

status.description: Attendance status (P, A, T, EA, ET)

delete.description: Deletes the attendance for a particular date for the specified student

get.description: Returns a paged list of dates for which attendance was taken
Returns a paged list of each student's attendance for the specified date

post.description: Sets the attendance for a particular date for multiple students

attendance.description: JSON array of {studentId, status, description} objects

delete.description: Deletes the attendance for a particular date for multiple students

get.description: Returns the list of available roles
Returns the list of roles assigned to a particular user

post.description: Assigns and unassigns roles for the specified user

roleMetaIdsToAssign.description: JSON array of role meta IDs

roleMetaIdsToUnassign.description: JSON array of role meta IDs

get.description: Returns the sections a student is enrolled in
Returns the details of the logged in user

apiKey.name: apiKey
apiKey.description: API key for authentication. Can also use OAuth access token.

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized - user is not authenticated or lacks permission

status.description: P (Present), A (Absent), T (Tardy), EA (Excused Absent), ET (Excused Tardy)
